name: Google Cloud Architecture Framework
description: Google Cloud Architecture Framework — best practices for designing and operating workloads on Google Cloud, organized across six pillars including a Security pillar.
relationToCloudSecurity: Google Cloud counterpart to AWS Well-Architected.
relationToAISecurity: AI workloads on Vertex AI and Gemini API inherit GCAF guidance.
